name: lib-5-signs
caption:
5 signs you're losing jobs to your phone (and don't know it).

Missed calls with no callback. Voicemail full. 'I rang you last week!' from a customer. Quiet weeks for no reason. Competitors busier than you on the same work.

If 2+ sound familiar — free audit, link in bio. 👇 Save this.

#tradesbusiness #plumber #electrician #tradestips #missedcalls

slides.headline: 5 signs you're losing jobs to your phone.
slides.body: And you don't even know it. Swipe.

slides.headline: Missed calls with no callback.
slides.body: Your log is full of numbers you never rang back. Each one was a job.

slides.headline: "I rang you last week!"
slides.body: A customer reminds you of a call you never saw.

slides.headline: Quiet weeks for no reason.
slides.body: Same marketing, same area — but the diary's patchy.

slides.headline: Competitors busier on the same work.
slides.body: Not better. Just faster to answer.

slides.headline: 2 or more sound familiar?
slides.body: Free missed-call audit — link in bio.
